title: Overview Widget date column
excerpt: The Overview Widget is very good.  Recently the timeline date format was adjusted to include the year (Which is awesome).  In the widget the timeline column needs to be expanded so it shows the new date format with the y…

posts.author: bholt (Brian Holt)
posts.cookedHtml: The Overview Widget is very good. Recently the timeline date format was adjusted to include the year (Which is awesome). In the widget the timeline column needs to be expanded so it shows the new date format with the year. Right now it cuts the finished date day and year off. (I see this as more of a bug than a request.)

posts.author: SMC (Leandre Waldo)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree; this feels like a bug. I had hoped there was a way to adjust the column width of the Overview widget (“Name” is quite long), but there isn’t which forces the dates off the screen even in full-screen mode.

posts.author: PrabSingh (Prab Singh)
posts.cookedHtml: This definelty needs fixing. A way to expand columns in the overview widget will be useful.

posts.author: jenholmes (Jennifer Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see this fixed asap. The overview widget is a must for dashboards, but the column widths need to be adjusted to show the full dates.
